di=a[dj]local dn=cq[dj]if dn~=di then cq[dj]=di if not dn then cr=cr+0B1 cp[cr]=dj end dn=di end dk[dl]=dn else dk[dl]=a[dj]end else local di=cb[dj]if dm==0B0 and di[0x1]then di=di[0B1][di[0b10]]end dk[dl]=di end end a[dg]=bx(dh,dk,cc)elseif df[ch]==0b100001111 then a[df[cm]]=#a[df[cl]];else cx=cx*a[df[cl]]end local de=cd[de+0x1]if de[ch]==p[0XE][0X9]then a[de[cm]]=cg[de[cl]];elseif df[ch]==0b11000001 then cx=cx-a[df[cl]]elseif df[ch]==p[0xA][0XA]then cx=cx^a[df[cl]]end local de=cd[de+0b1]if de[ch]==0x95 then a[de[cm]]=#a[de[cl]];elseif de[ch]==0xF8 then a[de[cm]]=not a[de+dg-0B1]=cn[dg]end else cd[a[dc[ch]]]={[cm]=dc[cm],[cl]=dc[cl],[ck]=(dc[ck]-0x24),[cj]=cd[a[dc[ch]]][cj]}end else local de=db local df=dc if df[ch]==0x8C then a[df[cm]]=cx elseif df[ch]==0B10101001 then cx=-cx else a[df[cm]]=cc[cg[df[cl]]];end local df=cd[de+0b1]if df[ch]==0B10110111 then cx=cx*a[df[cl]]elseif df[ch]==0xE1 then a[df[cm]]=a[df[cl]]*a[df[ck]];else else local di=cb[dj]if dm==0X0 and di[0B1]then di=di[0x1][di[0b10]]end dk[dl]=di end end a[dg]=bx(dh,dk,cc)elseif df[ch]==0B100101000 then cx=a[df[cm]]elseif df[ch]==0B1110100 then dg=ct[cv-de[0B10]]local de=ct[cv-de[0X3]]cv=cv-p[0x4][0X9]de(dg,df)else if dd~=0X9D then cx=#cx else do for de=cr,0B1,-0x1 do local df=cp[de]local dg=cq[df]if dg then local dh=dg[0b1]if dh==0X0 then local de=de local de=df-de+0B1 local dg=ct[de]return dg(u(ct,de+0B1,df))end end end else if dd<=0B1010_0000 then if dd<=0b10011111 then local de=ci[dc[ch]]local de=de[0B1]-0x1 local df=ct[cv]local
